attr.title: BRKCHRD
attr.desc: Live chord-performance synth with configurable colour and degree layers, sound editing, momentary performance FX and automatic voice leading.
attr.inst: Verified target: TrimUI Brick with Knulli/PortMaster. L1 selects alternate layers, L2 cycles CHORD/SOUND/PERF FX, R1/R2 select chord banks, Select opens Settings. Configuration and logs are stored under brkchrd/conf.
